name: AEON Headquarters
desc: The Headquarters of the Arbeits-und Erziehungsorgan der Nation (National Ministry for Work and Education) or more commonly known as AEON. A government agency of the Nation, its primary duty is to oversee the education and the wellbeing of the Nation's labor force. Less spoken out loud is its various 'vocational' facilities operated on every planet under control of the Nation. Unlike most other agencies within the Nation's government, it operates a large amount of armed Protektor Replika units. Officially they are used as support to the gestalt (human) workforce under its purview, they primarily used to control, suppress or intimidate the citizens of the Nation.

name: AEON Facility
desc: A facility overseen by the Arbeits-und Erziehungsorgan der Nation (National Ministry for Work and Education) or more commonly known as AEON. Although considered a 'vocational work facility', this expansive facility has rather austere living conditions for its gestalt (human) workers. Officially these facilities are vocational work facilities but for many members of the Nation, these are essentially work camps for the unwanted, the political dissident or problematic people. Its not unheard of for people to disappear in these camps.

name: VEB Rotfront Hydroponiks
desc: A series of hydroponics farms and food processing factories dotting the planet. Although part of the food supply chain, several of these production sites do not mass produce basic foodstuff but rather produce consumer goods that provide comfort food or items for the moral of the populace as well as for export. Volkseigener Betrieb Rotfront Hydropinik is known to produce a variety of items such as cigarettes, soft drinks, beer and candy

name: Rotfront Array
desc: A series of radio towers, transmitter dishes and receivers spread across several square kilometers. Although normally the Nation would use the space relay, the Rotfront Array is seen as a secondary site vital for survivable communications in case of an enemy raid disabling the primary communications relay.

name: Defense Coordination Center
desc: During the war against the Empire, the Nation built hundreds of large cannons designed to defend Vineta from orbital assault. Since then the Nation's Volksarmee has embarked on a modernization program to improve and fully network the various ground defense systems scattered throughout Vineta. Networking the existing ground defense sites with newly constructed, the Volksmarmee intends to make anyone seeking to invade Vineta think twice or, pay dearly for sacred Nation soil.

name: Imperial-era Floating Arcologies
desc: Initial Colonization of Buyan was incredibly difficult and costly. However the original colonial authority, then the Empire developed cost effective ways to build and sustain floating habitats above the toxic clouds. Throughout the Empire's reign over the Eusan people, a vast amount of money was spent building a grand network of arcologies to help facilitate easy transport of goods off planet. Post-war repair projects to the surviving arcologies allowed Buyan's population to reestablish reliable transport and trade with the rest of the system.
